title: Entertainment and functions
description: You can't claim the cost of attending functions or participating in entertainment involving food, drink or recreation.
keywords: deductions entertainment, functions, balls, drink, party

content_blocks.text: Events, dinners, dances and cocktail parties aren't deductible expenses, even if they are attended exclusively by your work colleagues, you discuss work at the functions and they are compulsory.
Leroy, a business development manager, attends a number of functions such as lunches, cocktail parties and dinners where he engages with potential new clients.
Despite the fact that Leroy conducts work-related discussions at these functions, he can't claim a deduction for the cost of attending. The expense is for entertainment (food and drinks).

content_text:
Events, dinners, dances and cocktail parties aren't deductible expenses, even if they are attended exclusively by your work colleagues, you discuss work at the functions and they are compulsory.
## Example: attending work function
Leroy, a business development manager, attends a number of functions such as lunches, cocktail parties and dinners where he engages with potential new clients.
Despite the fact that Leroy conducts work-related discussions at these functions, he can't claim a deduction for the cost of attending. The expense is for entertainment (food and drinks).
source_title: Entertainment and functions | Australian Taxation Office
source_description: You can't claim the cost of attending functions or participating in entertainment involving food, drink or recreation.
